title: night: 3:4 social artwork + typo-fixed landscape banner
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
Two more public assets for the /night promo, referenced by Buffer posts:

- `night-social-3x4.jpg` — new 3:4 portrait artwork (displays uncropped on LinkedIn/Facebook/X)
- `night-banner-wide-wide.jpg` — landscape banner; the original had a "GASWERKSIEDLLUNG" typo, fixed via generative edit before use

Already deployed to production manually.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Night gets the right crop
gist.blurb: The /night garden now has a portrait-ready social card and a freshly proofread wide banner. Even moonlit pixels deserve spellcheck.
gist.summary: Added a new 3:4 /night social artwork for uncropped LinkedIn, Facebook, and X posts, plus a corrected landscape banner with the GASWERKSIEDLLUNG typo fixed.
gist.impact: People seeing /night promotion get a properly framed portrait image on social feeds and a clean, typo-free wide banner.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polly as a tiny nocturnal art director in a cozy moonlit pixel garden, using a painter's beret and clipboard to hang two framed /night artworks: a tall 3:4 portrait card and a wide corrected banner. Include soft flowers, vines, and a warmly glowing retro display to make the asset-format update visible without relying on dense text.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and a tiny painter's beret, carefully hanging a tall portrait artwork beside a wide landscape banner in a moonlit flower garden; a small CRT monitor glows lime green (#ecf874) nearby, with code-plants and soft pastel vines around the frames. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic and emotionally warm.
